training.method: real-crop copy-paste composites (1200) + real train, label cleanup (+109 missed labels)
training.purpose: reduce per-tile false positives and misses in dense mats

acceptance_report.source: held-out test (count-banana-plants, aerial UAV, per-plant labels)
acceptance_report.eval_method: raw detector, imgsz=1024, conf=0.25, NMS iou=0.7, greedy IoU>=0.5 matching
acceptance_report.note: Real improvement in per-object detection: fewer false positives (precision 0.82 -> 0.90) and fewer misses (recall 0.80 -> 0.85) vs v3, from real-crop copy-paste augmentation + label cleanup. Single farm/region; count operating point should be recalibrated per farm (real_data/calibrate_count.py).

notes: YOLOv8m trained with real-crop copy-paste composites + label cleanup on count-banana-plants (CC-BY-4.0). Best per-object detection of the v3/v4/v5 line on the held-out test.
